basics.name: Ahyan Gogda
basics.title: Performance Marketing Enthusiast
basics.summary: I realized people don't ignore marketing - they ignore messages that feel irrelevant. I saw this clearly while building two ventures. CampuX.in focused on solving everyday campus problems for students, while Ve-Care was designed to address a real need we strongly believed in. The idea was strong, but timing mattered - we recognized the market may not be ready today. That insight taught me an important lesson: success is not only about a good idea, but about readiness, behavior, and demand. We plan to revisit Ve-Care in the future when the market evolves. Today, as an 3rd year IMBA student at LJ University, I focus on performance marketing, consumer psychology, and data-driven decision making. I combine creative thinking, analytics, and AI tools to design strategies that attract attention, build trust, and drive meaningful engagement. Winning Best Bidding Strategy at Bizzest 3.0 and securing 2nd place at Hackathon 7.0 strengthened my ability to think strategically under pressure and turn insights into action. I believe marketing is not about selling - it's about solving and connecting. And the brands that understand timing and people are the ones that truly grow.
